ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., Oil Products Tanker, Cargo Ship) */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Flag state of the vessel */,
  "classification_society" TEXT /* Classification society of the vessel */,
  "built" TEXT /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "gt" INTEGER /* Gross Tonnage (GT) of the vessel */,
  "dwt" INTEGER /* Deadweight Tonnage (DWT) of the vessel */,
  "size_m" TEXT /* Size of the vessel in meters */,
  "size_b" TEXT /* Beam of the vessel in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_vessel_type FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_type") REFERENCES vessel_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipyards" (
  "shipyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipyard */,
  "shipyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shipyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the shipyard */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the shipyard */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the shipyard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel being maintained */,
  "shipyard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipyard where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_maintenance_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_maintenance_shipyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipyard_id") REFERENCES shipyards ("shipyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the crew member is assigned to */,
  "crew_position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member (e.g., captain, engineer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "certificate_of_competency" TEXT /* Certificate of competency of the crew member */,
  "medical_certificate" TEXT /* Medical certificate of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crews_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_port" TEXT /* Starting port of the route */,
  "end_port" TEXT /* Ending port of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in nautical miles */,
  "expected_duration" REAL /* Expected duration of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel on the voyage */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being taken */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the voyage */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the voyage */,
  "cargo_manifest" TEXT /* Cargo manifest of the voyage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption in tons */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled in nautical miles */,
  "fuel_consumption_per_hour" REAL /* Fuel consumption per hour in liters */,
  "fuel_efficiency_per_nautical_mile" REAL /* Fuel efficiency per nautical mile in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in tons */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions in tons */,
  "sox_emissions" REAL /* SOx emissions in tons */,
  "emissions_per_kg_fuel" REAL /* Emissions per kilogram of fuel in grams */,
  "emissions_per_nautical_mile" REAL /* Emissions per nautical mile in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo" (
  "cargo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo (e.g., container, bulk) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in kilograms */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the cargo in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_cargo_type FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_type") REFERENCES cargo_types ("cargo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the port */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "fuel_cost" REAL /* Fuel cost in dollars */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost in dollars */,
  "cargo_cost" REAL /* Cargo cost in dollars */,
  "fuel_cost_per_hour" REAL /* Fuel cost per hour in dollars */,
  "maintenance_cost_per_day" REAL /* Maintenance cost per day in dollars */,
  "cargo_cost_per_ton" REAL /* Cargo cost per ton in dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel type (e.g., Oil Products Tanker, Cargo Ship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_types" (
  "cargo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo type */,
  "cargo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cargo type (e.g., container, bulk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes_vessels" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id", "vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes_ports" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id", "port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages_cargo" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "cargo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id", "cargo_id")
)
